11.response: {"Q0":"Maybe the risk taking behavior of people with different moods."}

0.response: {"Q0":"I just remembered the button combo for each planet, I didn't pay attention to the visual ques (wood, stone, etc)"}

7.response: {"Q0":"I responded the same. It didn't impact my motivation but I noticed I was earning less."}

9.response: {"Q0":"I was more focused on selecting galaxies, I would remember what I saw earlier and make a decision of which one to pick while still at the planet"}

8.response: {"Q0":"Typically just picked the one with the greater odds unless they were very similar odds, then I picked the higher monetary amount"}
